title: Dither Studio update
summary: Added Ordered Dithering to my tool: - 2x2 Bayer - 3x3 Bayer - 4x4 Bayer * - 8x8 Bayer - 16x16 Bayer - 3x3 Dispersed - 4x4 Horizontal - 4x4 Vertical - 2x2 Crosshatch - 3x3 Crosshatch - 4x4 Crosshatch Noticed it makes JPG artefacts more visible, so I redid my test images as PNG! pic.twitter.com/fdUYzs9jeh — Matt Sephton🎴 (@gingerbeardman) February 5, 2021
content:
Added Ordered Dithering to my tool:

- 2x2 Bayer
- 3x3 Bayer
- 4x4 Bayer *
- 8x8 Bayer
- 16x16 Bayer
- 3x3 Dispersed
- 4x4 Horizontal
- 4x4 Vertical
- 2x2 Crosshatch
- 3x3 Crosshatch
- 4x4 Crosshatch

Noticed it makes JPG artefacts more visible, so I redid my test images as PNG! pic.twitter.com/fdUYzs9jeh

— Matt Sephton🎴 (@gingerbeardman) February 5, 2021
